health_conditions: Child with growth hormone deficiency (attributed to maternal malnutrition during pregnancy)

benefits.description: growth hormone stimulates endogenous HGH production

protocol_notes: User has at least one child on growth hormone therapy due to poor maternal nutrition during pregnancy (mother 'ate nothing but junk and fast food after first month of pregnancy, drunk nothing except coke'). User characterizes peptides as 'relatively non-invasive because they stimulate endogenous production of HGH'. Advocates for anti-aging PCP or alternative medicine-open pediatrician for evaluation.
